Metadata.title: utxo AG — Email-First AI Agents
Metadata.description: We build agentic coworkers. You hire them by email. utxo AG is a product studio focused on Email-First AI Agents that integrate into your existing workflows.

Hero.label: Product Studio
Hero.description: No new tools. No training. Just forward an email — your AI coworker handles the rest. Deeply integrated with SAP, Outlook, Teams, and more.

data.name: Data Analysis Agent
data.subject: Re: Q4 revenue breakdown by region
data.body1: Here's the Q4 revenue breakdown you requested. I pulled the numbers directly from your SAP system and cross-referenced them with the CRM pipeline data.
data.body2: Key findings: DACH region grew 18% QoQ, driven by 3 new enterprise accounts. Southern Europe underperformed target by 6%, mainly due to delayed onboarding of the Milan contract.
data.closing: Want me to break this down further by product line? Just reply and I'll pull the SKU-level data.

crm.name: CRM Coworker Agent
crm.subject: Daily lead summary — 3 new, 2 follow-ups due
crm.body1: Good morning. I scanned your inbox and CRM overnight. Here's what needs attention today.
crm.body2: 3 new inbound leads came in from the website contact form. I've already created records in HubSpot and enriched them with LinkedIn data.
crm.closing: I've drafted personalized replies for each lead based on their industry. Reply 'send' to approve, or edit them in HubSpot first.

research.name: Research Agent
research.subject: Re: Competitor analysis — AI agents in DACH
research.body1: I've completed the competitive landscape analysis for AI agent providers in the DACH region. I reviewed 14 companies, cross-referenced Crunchbase funding data, and analyzed their product positioning.
research.body2: The market is still early. Most competitors focus on chat-based interfaces or dashboards. Only 2 others offer email-based interaction, but neither supports SAP integration.
research.closing: I also found 3 potential partnership opportunities. Want me to draft outreach emails?

invoice.name: Invoice Agent
invoice.subject: Invoice batch processed — 12 done, 1 flagged
invoice.body1: I processed the 13 invoices you forwarded this morning. 12 matched existing purchase orders in SAP and have been routed for approval.
invoice.body2: 1 invoice from DataStream GmbH (€14,200) doesn't match any open PO. The amount is also 22% higher than their last 3 invoices. I've flagged it for manual review.
invoice.closing: The approved invoices are queued for payment on Feb 3. Reply to adjust the payment date or approve the flagged one.
invoice.footer: Avg. processing time: 8 seconds per invoice

Agents.label: Agents
Agents.title: Agentic coworkers, ready to work.
Agents.description: Some are available instantly. Others are custom-built for your company — with deep integrations into SAP, Microsoft 365, Slack, and your existing tools.

teacherSupport.name: Teacher Support Agent
teacherSupport.description: Lesson planning, curriculum alignment, and teaching support — entirely via email.

adVisuals.name: Ad Visuals Generator
adVisuals.description: Turns short briefs into campaign-ready visuals. Send a one-liner, get back designs.

brandCi.name: Brand & CI Extraction Agent
brandCi.description: Analyzes existing material and extracts brand rules, tone, and visual logic.

dataAnalysis.name: Data Analysis Agent
dataAnalysis.description: Ask business questions in plain English. Get answers from your data.

meetingNotes.name: Meeting Notes Agent
meetingNotes.description: Forward meeting recordings or transcripts. Get structured summaries, action items, and follow-ups.

invoiceProcessing.name: Invoice Processing Agent
invoiceProcessing.description: Send invoices as attachments. Gets them categorized, validated, and ready for approval.

crmCoworker.name: CRM Coworker Agent
crmCoworker.description: Reads inbound emails, updates CRM records, drafts replies, flags deals.

supportTriage.name: Support Triage Agent
supportTriage.description: Classifies, prioritizes, and routes support requests automatically.

internalOps.name: Internal Ops Agent
internalOps.description: Handles repetitive operational workflows across teams and tools.

evaluationQa.name: Evaluation & QA Agent
evaluationQa.description: Scores outputs, checks quality, and logs every decision for audit.

complianceMonitor.name: Compliance Monitor Agent
complianceMonitor.description: Continuously checks processes against regulatory requirements and flags violations.

onboarding.name: Onboarding Agent
onboarding.description: Guides new hires through setup, documentation, and team introductions via email.

HowItWorks.label: How It Works
HowItWorks.title: Three steps. No onboarding.
HowItWorks.step1Description: Write to the agent like you'd write to a colleague. Plain language, attachments, whatever you need.
HowItWorks.step2Description: It reads your request, connects to your systems — CRM, databases, APIs — and executes the task.
HowItWorks.step3Description: A reply lands in your inbox with the completed work. Review it, reply to refine, or move on.

Portfolio.label: Portfolio
Portfolio.title: Also built by utxo AG
Portfolio.description: Products and protocols we've built from scratch — now used by thousands.

nmkr.description: The largest NFT infrastructure on Cardano. 2.4M+ tokens minted, multi-chain support across Cardano, Solana, Aptos, and Midnight. Backed by EMURGO.

finest.description: BaFin-compliant tokenization launchpad for real-world assets. Fractional ownership of real estate, diamonds, and commodities. Built with FluidTokens and IAMX.

masumi.description: Decentralized protocol for the AI agent economy. Identity, payments, and discovery for autonomous agents. Co-developed with Serviceplan Group.

Founder.quote: We believe the best AI tools disappear into workflows you already use. No dashboards to learn, no apps to install — just email. That's how work should be.
Founder.name: Patrick Tobler
Founder.role: Founder & CEO · Speaker at Cardano Summit & World Economic Forum

PitchThankYou.headline: Thank you.
PitchThankYou.subline: The future of work starts in your inbox.

WhoWeAre.label: Who we are
WhoWeAre.headline: Four years of digital infrastructure.
WhoWeAre.description: We are technology builders. Since 2021, we have been building digital infrastructure — with global partners and on enterprise standards.
WhoWeAre.brand1Desc: Blockchain infrastructure. Global partners across tech, finance and enterprise.
WhoWeAre.brand2Desc: Network for autonomous AI agents. Enterprise-grade, built to the highest standards.
WhoWeAre.brand3Desc: Marketplace for AI agents. Bookable agents as a service.
WhoWeAre.footnote: Today we translate that enterprise experience for the Swiss Mittelstand.

WhyUtxoAG.label: Why we exist
WhyUtxoAG.quoteText: The Mittelstand is being left behind.
WhyUtxoAG.quoteAttribution: The insight from three years of enterprise work with Masumi and Serviceplan.
WhyUtxoAG.context: Corporates have budgets, departments and consultants for AI. SMEs don't have the time, the experts — and no appetite for annual contracts starting at €60,000.
WhyUtxoAG.solution1Desc: Enterprise-grade technology, tailored to SME scale.
WhyUtxoAG.solution2Desc: Monthly billing. Cancel anytime. No annual contract.
WhyUtxoAG.solution3Desc: Running in your actual process. Not in a demo environment.
WhyUtxoAG.footnote: Otto is the first agent of this line — purpose-built for email-driven SME workflows.

MarketReality.label: Market
MarketReality.footnote: SMEs don't need an enterprise platform. They need a coworker that gets to work immediately.

WhyNow.label: Why Now
WhyNow.footnote: 82% of companies report productivity gains from generative AI.
WhyNow.item1Label: The EU AI Act takes full effect. Non-compliance is not an option.
WhyNow.item2Label: The AI agent market is growing annually. Early adopters gain the edge.
WhyNow.item3Label: Output declining, skilled workers scarce. Efficiency is no longer a luxury.

Problems.label: The Problem
Problems.item1Desc: The know-how is missing — internally and externally.
Problems.item2Title: Systems don't talk to each other.
Problems.item2Desc: Without ERP, CRM, and email integration, AI remains a toy.
Problems.item3Desc: GDPR, EU AI Act, Cloud Act. Who can keep up?
Problems.email2Preview: Error: incompatible format. Manual workaround attached.
Problems.email3Subject: Fwd: Fwd: Fwd: GDPR AI Assessment

CompetitivePressure.label: Competitive Pressure
CompetitivePressure.chartLabel: Share of SMEs with positive profit margin

Conviction.label: Our Conviction
Conviction.footnote: Healthy AI integration: empowering employees, not replacing them.
Conviction.item1Desc: The agent handles routine work. People steer, review, improve.
Conviction.item2Desc: Specialists grow into leadership roles. AI makes their know-how scalable.
Conviction.item3Desc: Custom documentation for your use case, hands-on coaching, and a team that's always there when results need fine-tuning.

Solution.label: The Solution
Solution.typicalAIDesc: You ask. It answers. It forgets immediately. You do the work.
Solution.coworkerDesc: Watches your inbox. Acts independently. Learns from your corrections.
Solution.subject: Subject
Solution.chat1Text: Complaint from Bauer Landtechnik: hydraulic valve leaking, batch 2024-03. 12 valves of this batch still in stock.
Solution.chat2Text: Recall prepared for all 12 customers. Replacement parts from batch 2024-05 available. Should I initiate the recall?
Solution.chat3Text: Wait, have the 2024-05 parts been QA-tested?
Solution.chat4Text: Yes, QA clearance from Feb 14 is on file. Test report attached.
Solution.chat5Text: Good. Start the recall, Bauer first — they need the parts most urgently.
Solution.chat6Text: Bauer Landtechnik notified, express shipping triggered. 11 other customers contacted, replacement schedules coordinated. ✓

EmailArchitecture.label: How It Works
EmailArchitecture.headline: Works where you work.
EmailArchitecture.description: No new tool, no training. Your CoWorker lives where you already work.
EmailArchitecture.footnote: Fully integrated. Human-in-the-loop: you stay in control.

TeamImage.label: Your Agent Team
TeamImage.headline: Not just Otto. Meet the entire crew.

UseCases.label: Use Cases
UseCases.headline: Your workflows. Efficiently leveraged.
UseCases.description: Every agent is tailored to your processes. You show us the workflow — we build the agent.
UseCases.footnote: AI replaces no one. It gives your employees time for what truly matters.
UseCases.item1Desc: Review inquiries, calculate, prepare quotes. The employee approves.
UseCases.item1Prompt: "Please prepare a quote for Müller GmbH based on their inquiry from this morning."
UseCases.item2Desc: Sort, prioritize, draft replies. The employee decides.
UseCases.item2Prompt: "Summarize all unanswered customer emails and draft replies by priority."
UseCases.item3Desc: Compare prices, forward documents, track deadlines.
UseCases.item3Prompt: "Compare prices for 500 hydraulic valves from our top 3 suppliers."

LiveDemo.label: Live Demo
LiveDemo.description: Before our meeting, our agent analyzed your company: business profile, pain points, optimization potential.
LiveDemo.boxDescription: No generic presentation. No slide overload. We show you what an agent can prepare with your publicly available data in 10 minutes.
LiveDemo.footnote: Experience firsthand how the agent works — before we even talk about your project.

ComparisonTable.label: Competitive Comparison
ComparisonTable.headline: Why utxo AG?
ComparisonTable.description: What sets us apart from the big platforms.
ComparisonTable.footnote: Swiss AG · No US CLOUD Act · EU data processing · Cancel monthly

SwissTrust.label: Data Protection
SwissTrust.utxo4: EU AI Act ready. Out of the box.
SwissTrust.us2: Microsoft, Salesforce & Co. subject to US access
SwissTrust.us3: No guarantee for EU data sovereignty
SwissTrust.us4: Political risks for data protection agreements
SwissTrust.footnote: 75% of companies prefer European AI providers for sensitive data.

SecurityArchitecture.label: Security & Architecture
SecurityArchitecture.headline: AI Coworker. Secure, controlled, productive.
SecurityArchitecture.subline: Your digital coworker for mid-market companies. Communicates, researches, and completes tasks. With built-in security architecture.
SecurityArchitecture.networkDesc: No unrestricted internet access. Only explicitly whitelisted services are reachable. Everything else is blocked.
SecurityArchitecture.permissionsDesc: Every action runs with minimum required privileges. Based on trigger, task, and whether a human or automation is acting.
SecurityArchitecture.emailDesc: Manipulative content is not interpreted as instructions. Protected against prompt injection attacks via email.
SecurityArchitecture.toolsDesc: Only assigned tools per task. Every action is traceable. No uncontrolled access.
SecurityArchitecture.benefitDesc: Your team is relieved, routine processes run faster — without compromising on security. The coworker operates within clearly defined boundaries, always under your team's control.
SecurityArchitecture.scope_userBased: User-Based: Permissions by trigger (customer vs. employee)
SecurityArchitecture.scope_automationBased: Automation-Based: Tighter permissions for autonomous agents
SecurityArchitecture.scope_fileBased: File-Based: Access restricted at file system level
SecurityArchitecture.memoryVector: Vector-PostgreSQL for session content, retrievable via vector search
SecurityArchitecture.memoryContext: Context managed via orchestrator and task comments
SecurityArchitecture.footnote: Security is not a feature — it's an architectural principle.

PilotPartner.label: Pilot Partner
PilotPartner.situation1: Skilled workers spend hours on routine inquiries.
PilotPartner.situation2: Customers wait too long for quotes.
PilotPartner.situation3: Foreign-language inquiries add complexity and delay.
PilotPartner.situation4: Incomplete details in requests slow down processing.
PilotPartner.goal1: Agent reviews, calculates, prepares the document.
PilotPartner.goal3: More time for consulting, customer relationships, and quality.

BusinessModel.label: Business Model
BusinessModel.headline: Two building blocks, one goal.
BusinessModel.subscriptionDesc: One plan per agent. Cancel monthly. Fast deployment.
BusinessModel.customDesc: We analyze your workflows together in a discovery workshop. Then we build the agent around your processes. Includes 6 months subscription.

TimeSavings.label: Time Savings
TimeSavings.headline1: Give your team their time back.
TimeSavings.item1Title: Your team consults instead of copy-pasting.
TimeSavings.item1Desc: More time for customer relationships that drive revenue.
TimeSavings.item2Title: First response wins the deal — speed matters.
TimeSavings.item2Desc: Not the cheapest wins, but the fastest. Otto ensures your team replies first.
TimeSavings.item3Desc: Volume spikes stop being a hiring problem. Otto absorbs the routine — your team stays focused on the work that matters.
TimeSavings.footnote: The real proof is the first week of use — not a slide.

Pricing.label: Pricing
Pricing.headline: Transparent and fair.
Pricing.defaultFootnote: Eligible for funding: Digitalbonus Bayern · Invest BW · go-digital
Pricing.tier3Feature1: Up to 10 custom skills + up to 5 CRM/API connections

Roadmap.label: Current Projects · Q1 2026
Roadmap.footnote: Our mission: integrating AI healthily into business — empowering employees, not replacing them.
Roadmap.project1Desc: Agent automatically checks dimensions and standards on technical drawings.
Roadmap.project2Desc: Agent receives inquiry, clarifies questions, calculates based on material and effort, coordinates with engineering — clerk approves.
Roadmap.project3Desc: Agent receives incident reports, checks status, escalates when needed, and keeps all stakeholders informed.

CTASlide.label: Next Step
CTASlide.step1Desc: With this meeting today, you've already taken the first and most important step.
CTASlide.step2Desc: You share your vision, we jointly identify the use cases with the biggest impact.
CTASlide.step3Desc: Architecture, interfaces, timeline. The foundation for your custom agent development.

HowToWorkWithOtto.label: How It Works
HowToWorkWithOtto.headline: Three steps. That's it.
HowToWorkWithOtto.description: Working with Otto is as intuitive as messaging a colleague. No training, no new tools.
HowToWorkWithOtto.step1Desc: Write to Otto in plain language — via email, chat, or your existing tools.
HowToWorkWithOtto.step2Desc: Otto reads your request, pulls data from your systems, and prepares the result.
HowToWorkWithOtto.step3Desc: Get the result delivered directly. Review it, refine it, or approve with one click.
HowToWorkWithOtto.footnote: No dashboards. No logins. Works with your existing tools.

InfosheetCTA.label: Your Demo Session
InfosheetCTA.description: In our demo session, we show you exactly how Otto works with your processes — no slides, real results.
InfosheetCTA.demoDesc: See Otto handle a real task from your industry — live, not simulated.
InfosheetCTA.takeawayDesc: A concrete implementation concept tailored to your biggest use case.
InfosheetCTA.timelineDesc: From first conversation to productive agent — typically 2 to 4 weeks.

Deliverables.label: What Your Agents Deliver
Deliverables.headline: Whatever you need. In any format.
Deliverables.description: You describe the result — your agents deliver it. Structured, ready to use, in the format that matters in your workflow.
Deliverables.footnote: Tell us what you need — your agents build it.

QuickReference.label: Quick Reference
QuickReference.headline: Need something? Just say it.
QuickReference.description: Your agent processes plain-language emails — and pulls in data from your ERP, CRM, or customer systems automatically.
QuickReference.quotePrompt: "Create a quote for Bauer Landtechnik, 50 hydraulic valves, delivery in 4 weeks."
QuickReference.complaintPrompt: "Customer Schmitt reported a defective part. Check batch, find affected orders."
QuickReference.reportPrompt: "Give me a summary of all open orders over €10,000."
QuickReference.followupPrompt: "Check if Müller GmbH has responded to our quote from last week."
QuickReference.translationPrompt: "Translate this French inquiry and draft a reply in German."
QuickReference.statusPrompt: "New order #4712 just came in via ERP — check stock, confirm delivery date, draft reply to customer."
QuickReference.footnote: Your agent learns from your corrections and gets better over time.

Limitations.label: Transparency
Limitations.cannot1: Make decisions on your behalf — you always approve.
Limitations.cannot2: Access systems without your explicit permission.
Limitations.cannot3: Replace the judgment of your experienced employees.
Limitations.cannot4: Guarantee 100% accuracy — that's why human review is built in.
Limitations.best1: Processing high volumes of routine emails in minutes.
Limitations.best2: Cross-referencing data across ERP, CRM, and email.
Limitations.footnote: Transparency builds trust. We'd rather be honest than overpromise.

What will your
AI CoWorker be called?
NameYourAgent.description: Otto, Lena, Kai — each built for a different role. Yours will have its own name, its own skills, its own focus. Who is missing from your team?
